title: Mi Engaño
html: Stub. The Spanish-language refrain ("she deceived me") that Dad has used for years to describe Mom. Per the burned papers surfaced October 2022, the underlying grievance is Mom's infertility and a $40K fertility-treatment spend in 2008 — the same year Dad lost the house. First mentioned in 2022 10 15 things on 10 1415 2022.

related.label: What a strange time indeed — early-COVID monologue from Dad's living room
